inputs.text: A sexy brunette girl stands fully grown in a bold, confident pose, viewed from an upskirt perspective that highlights her red thong panties peeking beneath a crisp grey skirt. She wears sleek white stockings that accentuate her legs, paired with a cropped top that adds to her edgy allure. The scene is rendered in flat, clean colors — no gradients or shading — emphasizing minimalist style while keeping focus on her striking silhouette.
